title: My Son Tricked Me Into A $240K Mortgage, Sold It, Called Me A Leech. So I Garnished His Wages.
description: After my son called me a greedy leech and sold the home I helped him buy, I went back to school at 58 and uncovered a secret bank account. Watch how a night-shift nurse used the law to recover every cent plus 10% interest. #FamilyBetrayal #FinancialJustice #TrueStory
thumb_text: I GARNISHED MY SON'S WAGES FOR 12 YEARS

thumb_lines.text: SON SOLD HOME, CALLED ME LEECH
AT 58 I BECAME A FINANCIAL PARALEGAL AND FOUND HIS HIDDEN ACCOUNT
